overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned casino or luxury hotel in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player moves through a shattered glass wall into a debris-filled atrium, examines a roulette table with a golden lion statue, approaches a character with colorful braided hair, and explores deeper into the ruined structure with overgrown vegetation and accumulated trash.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned casino atrium entry with shattered glass wall

events.description: player moves through broken glass window from exterior into abandoned building interior
camera adjusts to interior lighting and continues moving forward into the atrium

agents.ego_description: moving through the shattered glass entry point into the debris-filled atrium, observing the abandoned luxury interior with scattered trash and a central gaming table

entered.detail: shattered glass wall with jagged edges marking the entry point into the abandoned structure
black metal bars lining the upper level or boundary of the atrium
tall palm tree growing inside the abandoned building, indicating long-term abandonment
large gaming table with red and gold trim, covered in dust and debris
scattered papers, bottles, and trash covering the marble floor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the player entering an abandoned casino through a shattered glass wall. The camera moves into a semi-covered atrium with natural light filtering through, revealing a debris-strewn marble floor, a large palm tree, and a roulette table in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned casino gaming floor with central roulette table

events.description: player slows approach to examine the roulette table and golden lion statue in detail
camera passes extremely close to the golden lion statue, which temporarily fills the entire frame

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the roulette table to examine the golden lion statue and scattered bottles, then moving toward a distant figure

entered.detail: large ornate golden statue of a lion positioned on the roulette table centerpiece
wall with colorful graffiti tags visible in the distance beyond the table

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the central roulette table, examining the ornate golden lion statue atop it. Moving around the table, the camera passes close to the statue before continuing toward a graffiti-covered wall where a character stands in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned corridor with graffiti art and overgrown debris

events.description: character with vibrant multicolored braided hair comes into clear view standing near the wall
player moves past the stationary character and continues deeper into the structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward a character with colorful hair standing by a graffiti wall, observing the overgrown leaves and debris, then passing by the character

notable_agents.action: standing still facing a wall with large colorful graffiti, wearing dark clothing and a backpack with vibrant blue, red, and yellow braided hair

entered.detail: large structural concrete column with graffiti tags
accumulated dried leaves and vegetation debris covering the floor
large glass wall showing exterior view and allowing natural light to enter

segments.scene_description: Moving past the roulette table, the player approaches a character with distinctive colorful braided hair standing near a graffiti-covered wall. The floor is covered in dry leaves and debris. The player passes the stationary character and continues toward a glass wall revealing the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: collapsed casino wing with trash accumulation and structural damage

events.description: moving from structured corridor into collapsed area with tilted beams and accumulated trash bags
character with colorful hair reappears walking through the trash pile toward the camera

agents.ego_description: navigating through a debris-filled corner with blue trash bags and collapsed structures, observing the character walking through the trash

notable_agents.action: walking through the trash pile toward the camera then past it, moving through the abandoned space

entered.detail: numerous blue and white plastic trash bags piled up in the corner
large metal or concrete structural beam tilted at an angle indicating structural collapse
damaged glass wall with cracks and holes showing the outside environment

segments.scene_description: The player enters a more damaged section of the building with tilted structural beams and piles of blue trash bags. Natural light streams through a collapsed glass wall ahead. The character with colorful hair walks through the trash pile, crossing paths with the player as the camera explores the debris-filled dead end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the entrance of a ruined luxury casino into its deeper, more dilapidated structural remains. It begins by passing through a shattered glass wall into a semi-covered atrium where natural light illuminates a debris-strewn marble floor and a solitary palm tree. As the camera moves forward, it circles an ornate golden lion statue atop a roulette table before gliding toward a graffiti-covered wall and a character with colorful braided hair. The scene then shifts deeper into the building, passing the stationary figure across a floor covered in dry leaves and moving toward a section of tilted structural beams. Finally, the camera explores a debris-filled dead end where natural light streams through a collapsed wall and the colorful-haired character walks through piles of blue trash bags.
